technique_summary: Instructional video demonstrating camera navigation skills in LapSim simulator for identifying and targeting gallstones.

verbal_cues: Wait for first gallstone and find it on tissue surface
Zoom in and match size to on-screen circle
Hold camera steady until gallstone disappears
Continue until all gallstones have been zoomed in on
common_errors_addressed: Proper size matching to target circle
